baby_tame.title: Tame a Baby Ender Trigon — born from Trigon eggs left after the fight, bondable when young

subtitle.text: Three heads. The original Ender Dragon had one. The Trigon is what the End made to fill the silence after.

description: CH.09 · THE ENDER TRIGON
▸ After the Ender Dragon falls,
the End does not become quiet.
The Ender Trigon fills the void.
It has three heads.
It does not respawn on command.
Find it in the outer End islands.
◈ ENDER TRIGON ATTACKS
└ Each head operates semi-independently
└ ✦ Void Burst: mid-range AOE from center body
└ ✦ Dragon Acid: ranged acid projectile, each head
└ ✦ Grab + Slam: melee grab, vertical slam damage
└ ✦ Head Detonate: if one head is killed, it detonates
(do not kill heads in rapid succession)
└ ✦ End Flight: unpredictable 3D movement in open space
└ Phase shift at 50% HP — all three heads sync
◈ FIGHT STRATEGY
└ Engage from below — Trigon prefers altitude
└ Elytra + Fireworks: essential for mobility
(Trigon is fast; stationary fighting = death)
└ Target one head at a time until 55% HP,
then switch to body damage to skip detonation phase
└ Dragon Breath potions: collect during fight
(used in Lingering Potion crafting post-fight)
└ Bring: Strength II potion + Healing II splash ×8
◈ BABY TRIGON TAMING
└ Ender Trigon leaves eggs after defeat
└ Eggs hatch into Baby Ender Trigon after time
└ Baby is tameable when young — use food or taming
item during the bonding window
└ Tamed Trigon: mountable, End-dimension flight
└ Trigon adds no unique item drops beyond vanilla
dragon rewards (Dragon Breath, XP, Elytra chance)
▸ The Ender Dragon was the guardian.
The Trigon was the successor.
The civilizations who built the portal
did not plan for there to be a next guardian.
The End did not ask for permission.
▶ Defeat the Ender Trigon [check]
▶ Tame a Baby Ender Trigon [check]
◇ Tamed Trigon: useful for Ch13+ End exploration.
The outer End islands are vast.
Elytra gets you there. Trigon is the home base.
